title: Mobile robot and control method thereof
abstract: The present disclosure discloses a mobile robot including a sensing unit, a controller, and a communication unit. The sensing unit obtains image information around the mobile robot, the controller generates a control signal using the image information, and the communication unit transmits the control signal to a terminal connected to the mobile robot through a wired or wireless communication method and receives a terminal signal from the terminal. The controller extracts property information of an unidentified user from the image information and determines whether there is an intruder or not based on the property information.
claims: Claims ( 19 ) A mobile robot, comprising: a camera of periodically photographing an image related to a cleaning area in which a main body is located; a memory where information related to an algorithm preset for analyzing the image is stored; and a controller of detecting a difference between a first image, a second image, and a third image sequentially photographed by the camera, identifying a first subject based on the difference detected by the controller, and detecting movement direction information of the first subject. The mobile robot of claim 1, wherein in the identifying of the first subject, a difference between the first image and the second image is detected, a first difference image is generated based on the difference between the first image and the second image, the first difference image is analyzed, and information related to the first subject is detected. The mobile robot of claim 2, wherein the controller determines a similarity between a plurality of image information included in a training data stored in the memory and the first difference image, and detects the information related to the first subject based on the similarity. The mobile robot of claim 1, wherein the controller detects a difference between the second image and the third image, generates a second difference image based on the difference between the second image and the third image, analyzes the second difference image, and detects the movement direction information of the first subject. The mobile robot of claim 1, further comprising: a communication unit of performing communication with an outside. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit information related to the first subject to at least one of a server and a terminal when the first subject is a person and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls a terminal to output an image of the first subject when the first subject is a person and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit a warning message to a terminal when the first subject is a person and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit information related to the first subject to at least one of a server and a terminal when the first subject is an entrance door and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit a warning message to a terminal when the first subject is an entrance door and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller controls a terminal to activate a reference information input screen of receiving reference information that is a reference for outputting an alarm. The mobile robot of claim 1, further comprising a driving unit for moving the main body. The mobile robot of claim 12, wherein the controller controls the driving unit to obtain the first image, the second image, and the third image in the same camera-facing direction at the same point. The mobile robot of claim 12, wherein the controller controls the driving unit so that the main doby tours a plurality of preset points in the cleaning area when monitoring driving of the mobile robot starts, and wherein the controller controls the camera to photograph the first to third images at each of the plurality of preset points. The mobile robot of claim 5, wherein the controller analyzes the second image to identify a location of the first subject. The mobile robot of claim 15, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit information related to the first subject to at least one of a server and a terminal when the first subject is a person, and the location of the first subject is in a boundary area, and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction to correspond to the boundary area. The mobile robot of claim 15, wherein the controller controls a terminal to output an image of the first subject when the first subject is a person, and the location of the first subject is in a boundary area, and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction to correspond to the boundary area. The mobile robot of claim 15, wherein the controller controls the communication unit to transmit a warning message to a terminal when the first subject is a person, and the location of the first subject is in a boundary area, and a movement direction of the first subject is a preset movement direction to correspond to the boundary area. The mobile robot of claim 11, wherein the reference information includes information on a type of the first subject corresponding to each boundary area and the movement direction information of the first subject.
